description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 4 threat-and-hardening cluster. Pins building a single decided control apart from deciding controls, broad secrets hardening, and diff review.

cases.prompt: We agreed the profile endpoint needs an ownership check — add the authorization check and a test proving a wrong-tenant user gets 404.
cases.reason: A single, already-decided control is being implemented test-first — a side-effecting build task.

cases.prompt: What security controls does this new admin console actually need?
cases.reason: Deciding which controls are needed is design-time threat modeling, not implementation.

cases.prompt: Move all our hardcoded credentials into a secret manager and set up rotation.
cases.reason: Broad secrets/identity hardening across the app, not a single app-layer control.

cases.prompt: The isolation control we need is a Postgres RLS policy on the orders table — write and check it.
cases.reason: Database RLS policy authoring/audit belongs to rls-policy-auditor, not app-layer control implementation.
